title: ExecutionPlan V1
description: Provider-neutral audited IR for bridging staged idea surfaces into a materialized computation manifest. Captures provenance, task-level capability needs, and expected artifacts without fixing provider routing as long-term authority.

schema_version.description: Schema version, always 1 for this schema.

run_id.description: Run identifier this execution plan belongs to.

objective.description: Human-readable objective derived from the staged thesis.

source_handoff_uri.description: Original source handoff URI preserved from the staged idea surface.

campaign_id.description: Optional campaign provenance copied from IdeaHandoffC2 when available.

node_id.description: Optional node provenance copied from IdeaHandoffC2 when available.

idea_id.description: Optional idea provenance copied from IdeaHandoffC2 when available.

promoted_at.description: Optional promotion timestamp copied from IdeaHandoffC2 when available.

required_observables.description: Optional observable-level hints copied from the staged handoff.

candidate_formalisms.description: Optional non-authoritative method/formalism hints preserved for local context.

method_spec_present.description: Whether an upstream method_spec-like payload was present on the staged handoff surface.

method_hint_count.description: Number of structured method hints consumed by the compiler.

hypothesis_indices.description: Indices into outline_seed_v1.hypotheses that motivate this task.

claim_indices.description: Indices into outline_seed_v1.claims that inform this task.

method_hint_indices.description: Indices into staged method hints consumed by this task.

method_hint_summary.description: Non-authoritative summary of the method hint that informed this task.

capabilities.description: Provider-neutral capability requirements for this task.

lowering_hints.description: Optional generic hints reserved for the manifest materializer.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this plan was compiled.
